g.class: am-directive-mark am-directive-mark-dot am-directive-move-1 am-directive-move-2 am-directive-move-3 am-directive-mark-hide-4
g.style: animation: am-directive-move-kf-1 500.000ms cubic-bezier(.2, .8, .2, 1) 720.000ms forwards, am-directive-move-kf-2 500.000ms cubic-bezier(.2, .8, .2, 1) 1220.000ms forwards, am-directive-move-kf-3 500.000ms cubic-bezier(.2, .8, .2, 1) 1720.000ms forwards, am-directive-mark-hide-kf-4 180.000ms cubic-bezier(.2, .8, .2, 1) 2220.000ms forwards; opacity: 0;
